spec.name: The Judge's Chambers
spec.description: You are in a small room that is filled with legal tombs. There is a small desk here, literally buried under legal documents. There is also a small window overlooking the northern part of the city.

west.description: The courtroom lies in that direction.

extra_descs.description: The books are very large and filled with Roman legal precedent.
There are hundreds of pages of petitions, lawsuits and court orders sitting on the desk. One particularly interesting case involves a nobleman, a slave and a roll of toilet paper.
